title: Shirahoshi Is Targeted Again
description: On pages 10–13, this part follows New Fish-Man Pirates, Narrator, Vander Decken, Unknown person #1, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, King Neptune. The core story beat is shirahoshi is targeted again.
scene: The scene centers on shirahoshi is targeted again, with New Fish-Man Pirates, Narrator, Vander Decken, Unknown person #1, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: New Fish-Man Pirates
dialogue.text: A few hours ago - Fish-Man District, "Noah"

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Listen up, Allies of Hordy Jones!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen and Rejoice!! Because you all get to be a part of this historic operation!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Decken...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As in, the captain of the flying Dutchman...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bahohoho hohoh!! Don't you worry...I'm his Descan-DANT!! Not some kind of ghost...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I am cursed, just like my ancestors!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: I'm a fishman who can't swim...! But this "Mato Mate" curse has also granted me a demonic power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Allow me to demonstrate...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's see... How about you?! human! Step forward!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HORDY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU!! are you serious about this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop this crazy talk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's Hachi- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's Hacchan- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HACHI- San...

dialogue.speaker: New Fish-Man Pirates
dialogue.text: Energy steroids are good for nothing but self- destruction!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And why would a fishman want to destroy fishman Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm tired of hearing your opinion.

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Don't underestimate the great warrior Neptunee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HACHI-SAN...!! Would you please spare me your whining...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's hard to believe you were once a member of the ARLONG Pirates I so admired...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've grown soft...!! It's time for a new generation to take over...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: We're going to put the humans in their place. For that, we need fishman Island, and Neptunee is in our way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was your crew who preached that our race stands above all others!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: But Arlong-San was defeated!! Nyuuuuuuu... Decken!! HyouZou!! are even you going to listen to this madness?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You never responded when Arlong called for your help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are you helping these young fools?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Helping? We've been hired, that's all. They pay us well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Arlong was always too tight with his cash. He never made us the right offer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He was a little girl, and he was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've never had a hope of matching me, ever since you were a kid...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I felt sorry for Arlong, having to make do with a swordsman of your level...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bahohohohohohohohoh!!!! Hachi of the Arlong Pirates?! Now that's a name I haven't heard in a while!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That captain of yours tried to make me one of his own minions!! The nerve of it all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't serve under anyone but myself!!! Hordy's the kind of man who understands that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Arlong-san had an ambition and drive that were worthy of respect... but he was too barbaric. He didn't have enough cunning...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back in the days when your crew were storming the seas, we were still kids. We weren't ready to become pirates, no matter how we might have wanted to.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But now, our generation is ready to take action.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I'd watch my words if I were you... don't get in the way of progress.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the man who has inherited the will of the Arlong Pirates...!! and it just breaks my heart...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to see a former member of that glorious crew objecting to my grand scheme...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why, from what I hear, the man who crushed the dreams of your old crew, straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...is on fishman Island as we speak...! Doesn't that stir anything in you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy called me his friend, despite the crew to which I once belonged...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In fact, I owe him my life!! I would go to meet him right away...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but how could I face him in the knowledge...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that Arlong's will still lives on?!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: You call a human your friend...? You're as bad as that filth Neptunee...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've lost all the respect I ever had for you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Lock on. You're in my sights now, Hachi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bahohohohoho hoh... have you forgotten what it means to be a pirate?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you've got a problem with us, we settle it through violence!! I know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A knife?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Arghhhh!!

summary: Shirahoshi Is Targeted Again. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
